MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-11-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF CHELSEA PACIFIC HOLDINGS, LP MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is OFF CALENDAR, conditional settlement filed on December 14, 2021. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-23-2021 Continued To Feb-28-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-12-2021 Continued To Jan-11-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Michael Hsueh; Burke Williams & Sorensen, LLP; 408-606-6300; appearing via Zoom on behalf of plaintiff Chelsea Pacific Holdings, LP.
Scott T. Okamoto; Law Office of Scott T. Okamoto; 415-766-5871; appearing via Zoom on behalf of defendant Alphaflow, Inc.

The parties stipulate to continuing the hearing to a later date. The court instructs the parties to submit a signed stipulation and proposed order to the court. The order is signed. The court rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF CHELSEA PACIFIC HOLDINGS, LP'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is continued to January 11, 2022, per stipulation of the parties.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Off Calendar Apr-09-2021 Set For Trial On Nov-01-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
